description_long: This object consists of a set of four pillows arranged on a large, soft mattress, all covered with a voluminous, slightly rumpled comforter. The pillows are rectangular and appear plush, with gentle creases and folds that suggest a soft, fabric exterior. The comforter drapes naturally over the mattress, with some areas bunched up and others lying flat, creating a realistic, lived-in appearance. The entire ensemble is rendered in a light, neutral color, likely off-white or pale gray, with no visible patterns or embellishments. The surface texture appears smooth and matte, typical of cotton or microfiber bedding. There are no visible tags, logos, or decorative elements, and the object is shown isolated without any surrounding context.
description: A set of four soft, rectangular pillows arranged on a large mattress with a rumpled comforter, all in a light, solid color. The bedding appears plush, smooth, and inviting, with no visible patterns or logos.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the pillows and comforter from a low, angled perspective, highlighting the plushness and the way the comforter drapes over the mattress.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a top-down angle, emphasizing the arrangement of the pillows and the central fold of the comforter.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bedding from the opposite side, showing the even alignment of the pillows and the smooth expanse of the comforter.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the foot of the bed, focusing on the layered look of the comforter and the way it bunches at the edges.
